violations.description: Video element has autoplay attribute but no controls attribute. Users cannot pause, stop, or control the volume of the auto-playing media. This is disorienting for screen reader users and problematic for users with cognitive disabilities.
violations.reference_fix:
<video width="700" controls>
    <source src="trailer.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    Your browser does not support the video tag.
</video>

page_description: A video streaming landing page featuring a hero section and trailer. The video element autoplays without providing user controls to pause or stop.
